title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents fail in production because the industry has normalized unreliability. He contends that even 90% per-step accuracy leads to compounding errors across multi-step workflows, and that building reliable agents requires focus on taste, dogfooding, and proof-of-work mechanisms rather than raw performance metrics.
